pi_items.source: Verified by reviewing setup_opentoonz.sh and checking the opentoonz_sample GitHub repository contents for dwanko_run.tnz.
Verified by reading export_result.sh which explicitly checks this path for generated PNG frames.
Verified by reading verifier.py which checks if file_count >= min_frame_count, matching the task prompt requirements.

Verified by reading verifier.py which enforces abs(shift_x) >= min_shift_px (using the metadata value). Even though the prompt mentions ~30 pixels, the actual programmatic test checks for a minimum of 5 pixels.
Verified by reading verifier.py and validating its numpy cross-correlation logic, which accurately assigns positive shift_x to rightward shifts of the red channel.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the 'dwanko_run.tnz' sample scene, sourced from the official OpenToonz GitHub sample repository and deployed to /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/. The agent must render at least 12 PNG frames to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/aberration/. The verifier uses numpy cross-correlation to ensure the red channel is horizontally shifted to the right by a minimum of 5 pixels relative to the green channel.
